data.title: Qin Shi Mingyue 3D Movie: Longteng Wanli
data.title_english: The Legend of Qin 3D Ancient Dragon Spirit
data.title_japanese: 秦时明月3D电影龙腾万里
title_synonyms: Qin Shi Mingyue 3D Dianying: Longteng Wanli
data.synopsis:
The movie reveals the events before Ge Nie and Tianming defeated 300 soldiers at Huangyang Chuan right at the start of season 1. The events will retell how Tianming and Ge Nie met. A new character and her relations to the Western Regions will be introduced as well.

(Source: wuxiaedge.com)

data.synopsis: Based on the adult manga by Sayu Ayuma.

titles.title: ケダモノたちの住む家で

data.title: Kedamono-tachi no Sumu Ie de
data.title_japanese: ケダモノたちの住む家で
data.synopsis:
Arata Asaoka lives with his despicable, chauvinist father and older brother. A house of three men.

Arata was an illegitimate child. Bearing only a tenuous blood relation to the man who bastarded him into the world, he was treated like a second-rate human. With nowhere else to go, Arata suffered the cruelty of his father and brother for years. For years, he forced a smile and pretended happiness for the sake of strangers... One day he met the girl who gave him hope. Her name was Koharu Hinomoto. She was a ray of sunshine. Being with Koharu made Arata feel good, and he fell deep in love. He began to believe that his life could be better.

Arata decided he would move out and live with her. Even without money, they could make it work. Anything was better than how he lived right now.

Arata knew in his heart that he could make a warm, loving family with Koharu.

If he could just move out... before his despicable family ruins everything.

(Source: dlsite)

titles.title: The Jakata Tale of the Golden Deer
ジャータカ物語 きんいろのしか

data.title: Jataka Monogatari: Kiniro no Shika
data.title_japanese: ジャータカ物語 きんいろのしか
title_synonyms: The Jakata Tale of the Golden Deer
data.synopsis:
A long time ago, an Indian princess dreamed of a golden deer singing in a beautiful voice. Seeing the king's treat, a boy sets a trap in the mountain. But when he sees what the trapped deer has done for his friends, he decides to let the deer go.

(Source: Gakken)
